basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad (IIT(ISM) Dhanbad) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.age_details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India
age_limit.details: As per the norms of the Govt. of India.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech/M.S/ Integrated M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech. in Metallurgical/Chemical/Mineral/Environmental/Computer Science or its related discipline OR M.Sc or M.Sc.Tech in Chemistry/Environmental Science or equivalent degree, GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualified
qualification.details: M.E/M.Tech/M.S/ Integrated M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech. in Metallurgical/Chemical/Mineral/Environmental/Computer Science or its related discipline OR M.Sc or M.Sc.Tech in Chemistry/Environmental Science or equivalent degree. Must be qualified in GATE/CSIR-UGC NET.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E/M.Tech/M.S/ Integrated M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech. in specific disciplines, or an M.Sc/M.Sc.Tech in Chemistry/Environmental Science. GATE/CSIR-UGC NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. How will candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting based on merit, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job opening?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT(ISM) Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines) Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations provided?
faq.answer: Age relaxation will be provided as per the norms of the Government of India for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.
